name: conestogo
description: Office map from flatland_server/test/conestogo_office_test, with a tricycle-drive + front laser robot. Asset paths are relative to this template directory and resolved to absolute paths by render.py so the rendered world.yaml is location-independent.
comment_candidates: Free-space [x, y, yaw] start poses and [x, y] goals. Categorical-over-candidates keeps placement valid. Goal difficulty (distance) is captured by the run, not the genome.
comment_component_overrides: Map a fault taxonomy type to the actual plugin name in THIS template's robot model (cleaner.model.yaml names its drive 'cleaner_drive' and laser 'laser_front'). Faults whose type is not listed keep the param_space default component.
